text: Hey guys, it's Dr. Mario Leyva. I have a quick video to show you.
This video demonstrates the use of ICG.
It was specifically helpful in this video as this was a prior cholecystectomy patient who had a remnant gallbladder that was causing symptoms.
The ICG Firefly was tremendously helpful in this case as the dissection was quite tedious.
